sentences.target: Meine Zeichnung liegt noch auf dem Tisch.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʦaɪ̯çnʊŋ liːkt nɔx aʊ̯f deːm tɪʃ./

translations.de: Meine Zeichnung liegt noch auf dem Tisch.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʦaɪ̯çnʊŋ liːkt nɔx aʊ̯f deːm tɪʃ./
translations.en: My drawing is still on the table.
translations.es: Mi dibujo todavía está en la mesa.
translations.fr: Mon dessin est encore sur la table.
translations.it: Il mio disegno è ancora sul tavolo.
translations.ko: 내 그림이 아직 테이블 위에 있어.
translations.ru: Мой рисунок всё ещё лежит на столе.
translations.pt: Meu desenho ainda está na mesa.
translations.vi: Bức vẽ của tôi vẫn ở trên bàn.
translations.nl: Mijn tekening ligt nog op tafel.
translations.uk: Мій малюнок досі лежить на столі.
translations.hu: A rajzom még az asztalon van.
translations.hi: मेरी ड्राइंग अभी भी मेज़ पर है।
translations.pl: Mój rysunek wciąż leży na stole.
translations.el: Το σχέδιό μου είναι ακόμα πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Tegningen min ligger fortsatt på bordet.
translations.id: Gambar saya masih di atas meja.
translations.sv: Min teckning ligger fortfarande på bordet.
translations.ro: Desenul meu este încă pe masă.
translations.cs: Můj obrázek je pořád na stole.
translations.da: Min tegning ligger stadig på bordet.
translations.ja: 私の絵はまだテーブルの上にある。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Zeichnung'; feminine singular nominative; marks the possessor (speaker) and agrees with the head noun.
Feminine noun; head of the subject NP; nominative singular.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; expresses the subject’s static location.
Temporal adverb indicating continuation of the state.
Two-way preposition introducing a PP; governs dative here to mark static location.
Definite article; dative masculine singular; modifies 'Tisch' as complement of 'auf'.
Masculine noun; object of the preposition 'auf'; dative singular; head of the PP.

sentences.target: Ich zeige dir später die Zeichnung.

translations.de: Ich zeige dir später die Zeichnung.
translations.en: I'll show you the drawing later.
translations.es: Te enseño el dibujo más tarde.
translations.fr: Je te montrerai le dessin plus tard.
translations.it: Ti mostrerò il disegno più tardi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我等会儿给你看这幅画。
translations.pt: Eu te mostro o desenho mais tarde.
translations.he: אני אראה לך את הציור אחר כך.
translations.vi: Lát nữa tôi sẽ cho bạn xem bức vẽ.
translations.nl: Ik laat je de tekening later zien.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें बाद में चित्र दिखाऊँगा।
translations.el: Θα σου δείξω το σχέδιο αργότερα.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; first person singular nominative; subject.
Main verb; 1st person singular present indicative; denotes the action performed by the subject.
Personal pronoun; second person singular dative; indirect object/recipient.
Temporal adverb specifying a future time.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; modifies 'Zeichnung' as direct object.
Feminine noun; direct object in accusative; the entity being shown.

sentences.target: Die Zeichnung passt nicht in den Rahmen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈʦaɪ̯çnʊŋ past nɪçt ɪn deːn ˈʁaːmən./

translations.de: Die Zeichnung passt nicht in den Rahmen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈʦaɪ̯çnʊŋ past nɪçt ɪn deːn ˈʁaːmən./
translations.en: The drawing doesn't fit in the frame.
translations.es: El dibujo no cabe en el marco.
translations.fr: Le dessin ne rentre pas dans le cadre.
translations.it: Il disegno non entra nella cornice.
translations.pt: O desenho não cabe na moldura.
translations.nl: De tekening past niet in de lijst.
translations.hu: A rajz nem fér bele a keretbe.
translations.hi: चित्र फ्रेम में फिट नहीं होता।
translations.pl: Rysunek nie mieści się w ramce.
translations.el: Το σχέδιο δεν χωράει στην κορνίζα.
translations.id: Gambar itu tidak muat di bingkai.
translations.sv: Teckningen får inte plats i ramen.
translations.cs: Ten obrázek se nevejde do rámu.
translations.ja: その絵は額に入らない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; modifies 'Zeichnung' as subject.
Feminine noun; subject of the clause; nominative singular.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; expresses compatibility/fit.
Negation particle; scopes over the predicate to negate 'passt'.
Two-way preposition introducing a PP; governs accusative here to mark direction/goal ('into').
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Rahmen' as complement of 'in'.
Masculine noun; complement of the preposition 'in'; accusative singular; destination container.

sentences.target: Lukas hängt die Zeichnung an die Wand.
sentences.reading: /ˈluːkas hɛŋt diː ˈʦaɪ̯çnʊŋ an diː vant./

translations.de: Lukas hängt die Zeichnung an die Wand.
translations.ipa: /ˈluːkas hɛŋt diː ˈʦaɪ̯çnʊŋ an diː vant./
translations.en: Lukas hangs the drawing on the wall.
translations.es: Lukas cuelga el dibujo en la pared.
translations.fr: Lukas accroche le dessin au mur.
translations.it: Lukas appende il disegno al muro.
translations.yue: 盧卡斯將幅畫掛喺牆上。
translations.pt: Lukas pendura o desenho na parede.
translations.he: לוקאס תולה את הציור על הקיר.
translations.vi: Lukas treo bức vẽ lên tường.
translations.nl: Lukas hangt de tekening aan de muur.
translations.hu: Lukas felakasztja a rajzot a falra.
translations.hi: लुकास चित्र दीवार पर टांगता है।
translations.el: Ο Λούκας κρεμάει το σχέδιο στον τοίχο.
translations.ja: ルーカスは絵を壁に掛ける。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; masculine personal name; subject in nominative.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; denotes causing placement by hanging.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; modifies 'Zeichnung' as direct object.
Feminine noun; direct object being hung; accusative singular.
Two-way preposition introducing a PP; governs accusative here to mark direction towards a vertical surface.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; modifies 'Wand' as complement of 'an'.
Feminine noun; complement of the preposition 'an'; accusative singular; destination surface.
